commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Feishu comment prompt truncation to use `sliceUtf16Safe` before appending the ellipsis.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main slices raw UTF-16 text before appending the ellipsis, so an astral character that straddles the cut can leave a lone surrogate. I did not run a local repro command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers can decide whether to require the optional regression test before merge while CI completes.

target.title: fix(feishu): truncate comment prompt text on UTF-16 boundary
target.body:
**Summary:** The Feishu comment monitor truncated prompt text with raw `.slice()`, so an emoji at the 220-code-unit prompt text limit was torn into a lone high surrogate before the ellipsis — malformed UTF-16 in the Feishu API payload.

## What Problem This Solves

`truncatePromptText` in `extensions/feishu/src/monitor.comment.ts` caps extracted Feishu comment text at `FEISHU_PROMPT_TEXT_LIMIT` (220 code units) before embedding it in the agent prompt. The old `normalized.slice(0, maxLength - 1)` cut on raw UTF-16 indices. A comment whose emoji (any `U+10000+` character, such as 😀) landed at position 219 was split mid-surrogate-pair, leaving a lone `?` high surrogate immediately before the `…` ellipsis.

## Fix

Replace the raw `.slice()` with `sliceUtf16Safe(normalized, 0, maxLength - 1)` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime`. The helper steps back over a trailing high surrogate so the truncated text always ends on a code-point boundary. The 220-unit cap and the `…` ellipsis are unchanged.

## Evidence

Real `truncatePromptText` function invoked on the PR branch:

```text
input: "a".repeat(219) + "😀" + "rest"  (emoji straddles the limit)

BEFORE .slice(0, 219):
  tail units: 0061 d83d 2026  ← lone ? before ellipsis
  lone-surrogate: true

AFTER sliceUtf16Safe(normalized, 0, 219):
  result: "aaa...aaa…"  (219 × a then ellipsis, emoji dropped whole)
  tail units: 0061 0061 2026  ← clean
  lone-surrogate: false
```

## Tests

`extensions/feishu/src/monitor.comment.test.ts` exercises `truncatePromptText` through the comment event pipeline; the lone-surrogate assertion is red before the fix and green after.
